# the yeomanizer

> A free, unofficial web tool that drafts U.S. Navy correspondence — standard naval letters
> and memoranda — in the exact format prescribed by SECNAV M-5216.5, with a live preview and
> one-click PDF / Microsoft Word (.docx) export.

the yeomanizer formats naval correspondence automatically: the letterhead, the
SSIC/identification block, the From/To/Via/Subj/Ref/Encl heading block, automatic paragraph
numbering and indentation, the signature block, CUI markings, and multi-page pagination —
all to the manual's standard. You type plain text on one side and a correctly formatted
letter appears on the other.

## Key facts
- Free, and runs entirely in your web browser. No account or login.
- Privacy by design: nothing you type is stored or transmitted; it is erased when you close the tab.
- Unofficial — not affiliated with or endorsed by the U.S. Navy or the Department of Defense.
- Exports to PDF (via print) and Microsoft Word (.docx).
- Supports the standard naval letter and the memorandum today; endorsements and NATO travel
  orders are in progress.

## Where
- https://yeomanizer.com

## Who it's for
Sailors, Marines, and DoD civilians who need to produce correctly formatted naval
correspondence quickly without memorizing SECNAV M-5216.5.
